stages.question: Which poster best demonstrates healthy screen time habits?

choices.text: Poster filled exclusively with various electronic devices
Poster showing diverse activities with moderate device usage
Poster depicting broken electronics with warning signs

stages.question: Which poster illustrates effective daily routine management?

choices.text: Poster displaying scheduled blocks for different activities
Poster with overlapping chaotic activity schedules

stages.question: Which poster represents responsible technology usage?

choices.text: Poster promoting continuous consumption of digital media
Poster restricting all non-digital recreational options
Poster balancing digital engagement with physical activities

stages.question: Which poster exemplifies mindful digital consumption?

choices.text: Poster emphasizing quality over quantity in tech use

stages.question: Which poster showcases integrated lifestyle wellness?

choices.text: Poster harmonizing technological and non-tech elements
Poster focusing solely on digital achievements
